title: Undopia 3D Pointed Dripstone
description: Gives the Pointed Dripstone a 3 dimensional model
body:
![undopia-3d-pointed-dripstone](https://i.imgur.com/SiPp9OT.png) # Undopia 3D Pointed Dripstone [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/undopia-3d-pointed-dripstone?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=%231bd96a) ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-3d-pointed-dripstone) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1116439?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge&color=%23f16436) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/undopia-3d-pointed-dripstone) [![ko-fi](https://i.imgur.com/wv1uE4k.png)](https://ko-fi.com/undugt) 3D Pointed Dripstone adds a 3D Model for the Pointed Dripstone. ---
[![Undopia Patch Resource Pack](https://i.imgur.com/beZ50qS.png)](https://patch.undopia.net) This resource pack is part of the Undopia Patch family. It is made of these Undopia Patch Features ![DM3gB8W.png](https://i.imgur.com/DM3gB8W.png) If you want to customize any of these use the Undopia Patch Customizer.
--- [![Customizer](https://i.imgur.com/UEAZSvr.png)](https://patch.undopia.net/custom-downloads/) [![FAQ](https://i.imgur.com/GGUjVLj.png)](https://patch.undopia.net/faq) [![Terms & Conditions](https://i.imgur.com/kVzzs3F.png)](https://patch.undopia.net/terms-and-conditions) [![Bug Report / Feature Suggestion](https://i.imgur.com/mYSKqtv.png)](https://github.com/UnduGT/undopiapatch/issues)
